Chronology of every recorded fact about [[pure madra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Pure madra can activate scripts and shake the spirit.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon possesses pure madra.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Pure madra is compatible with everything but is weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Pure madra is rare and has many advantages and disadvantages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Pure madra is used to cleanse the spirit of Blackflame corrosion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon was cycling pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Pure madra is second to none for attacking and defending the spirit, but it cannot interact with the physical world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Pure madra can be used to repair a core.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Pure madra can ripple through a person's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon cycles pure madra.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — Pure madra is easier on the channels than Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Pure madra is difficult to detect by nature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon pushes pure madra through his channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Pure madra is lighter, more delicate, and more adaptable than other aspects of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Pure madra is the foundation for all other aspects of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — A mass of pure madra can hover in the sky.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon ran pure madra through the script-circle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon uses pure madra as a backup to Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — A presence of pure madra was poised outside Lindon's tent.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Pure madra is almost colorless with a tinge of blue-white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan's section of the box contained scales of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon was attempting to fight using only his pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon can use pure madra to boost the performance of a construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan released a detonation of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Pure madra can wipe away fire madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses pure madra to direct the spiritual power.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon uses pure madra to wash out the madra in Daji's armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Pure madra streamed into Lindon's spirit during the power drain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — pure madra is naturally subtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon can give off a domineering impression with pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon's pure madra feels like a cleansing tide due to his bond with Little Blue.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan can emit a pulse of pure madra as a signal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon gathers pure madra in his finger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Pure madra blasted down and speared the Jade through the soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses pure madra to fuel the fortress scripts.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon can run pure madra through the openings of the Tomb Hydra's binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's channels are filled with pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Pure madra is used in Soulsmithing for its universal compatibility and ability to purify.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon has a protective field of pure madra.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon used pure madra to create temporary bypasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's Empty Palm is a strike of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon destroyed a security construct with pure madra.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon used a pulse of pure madra to activate the construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon possesses the emptiness of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Pure madra can be used to soothe chaos in a soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — A column of liquid blue-white power in the center of the cave was pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin needed pure madra or shadow to fight spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Little Blue can send soothing pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Lindon used pure madra to construct his meeting-space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Wei Grand Elder gathers pure madra in his palm.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
